Your batch: `StationpediaPlus/coordination/outputs/review-batch-16.json`

For each device:
1. Find ALL logic types from `Stationeers/Stationpedia/Stationpedia.json`
2. Add descriptions for every missing type (use standard descriptions for generic types)
3. VERIFY Mode/Setting/Ratio/Error/Lock against source code in `Assembly-CSharp/`

Output COMPLETE device entries to: `StationpediaPlus/coordination/outputs/review-batch-16-complete.json`

Work autonomously. Read source code for device-specific types. Complete all devices before reporting.

_**Agent (copilot/claude-sonnet-4.5)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="generic" data-tool-name="run_in_terminal"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **run_in_terminal**</summary>

**Input:**

- command: `$devices = @('ThingStructureTankSmallInsulated','ThingStructureMediumRocketLiquidFuelTank','ThingStructureActiveVent','ThingStructureHydraulicPipeBender','ThingStructureIceCrusher','ThingStructureWeatherStation','ThingStructureWaterDigitalValve','ThingDeviceLfoVolume','ThingStructureLogicMathUnary','ThingStructureAccessBridge','ThingModularDeviceNumpad','ThingStructureFlashingLight','ThingModularDeviceLightLarge','ThingModularDeviceSquareButton','ThingModularDeviceDialSmall','ThingStructureMediumConvectionRadiatorLiquid','ThingStructureIgniter','ThingStructurePipeLabel'); $json = Get-Content 'C:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\Stationeers\Stationpedia\Stationpedia.json' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $output = @(); foreach($d in $devices) { $entry = $json.pages | Where-Object {$_.Key -eq $d}; if($entry) { $logics = @{}; foreach($l in $entry.LogicInsert) { if($l.LogicName -match 'LogicType(\w+)') { $logics[$matches[1]] = @{access=$l.LogicAccessTypes} } }; $slots = @(); if($entry.Slots) { foreach($s in $entry.Slots) { $slots += @{name=$s.SlotName; type=$s.SlotType} } }; $output += @{device=$d; title=($entry.Title -replace '<[^>]+>',''); logics=$logics; slots=$slots; logicCount=$logics.Count} } }; $output | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 | Out-File 'C:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\batch16_logic_data.json' -Encoding UTF8; Write-Host "Extracted logic data for $($output.Count) devices" -ForegroundColor Green; $output | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $($_.title): $($_.logicCount) logic types" }`
- explanation: `Extract all logic types and access info for batch 16 devices from Stationpedia`
- isBackground: `false`

</details></tool-use>

          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Volatiles ratio at output connection."
        },
        "RatioWaterOutput": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Water vapor ratio at output connection."
        },
        "RatioNitrousOxideOutput": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Nitrous oxide ratio at output connection."
        },
        "CombustionOutput": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Whether combustion is occurring at output."
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "deviceKey": "ThingStructureActiveVent",
      "title": "Active Vent",
      "logicDescriptions": {
        "On": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Device on/off state."
        },
        "Mode": {
          "dataType": "Integer",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Vent direction: 0=Inward (pumping into internal), 1=Outward (pumping to world)."
        },
        "Lock": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Locks device to prevent manual operation."
        },
        "Power": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Returns 1 if device is powered."
        },
        "RequiredPower": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0+ W",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Power draw in watts."
        },
        "Error": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Returns 1 if device is in error state (missing pipe network or world grid access)."
        },
        "Ratio": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Fill ratio of internal pipe network."
        },
        "Setting": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0+ kPa",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "General purpose setting value (not used by ActiveVent, use PressureExternal/PressureInternal)."
        },
        "Open": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Whether device is open."
        },
        "Maximum": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0+",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Maximum moles capacity."
        },
        "PressureExternal": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0+ kPa",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "External pressure limit in kPa - vent stops pumping outward when world pressure reaches this."
        },
        "PressureInternal": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0+ kPa",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Internal pressure limit in kPa - vent stops pumping inward when pipe pressure reaches this."
        },
        "ReferenceId": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "Unique",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Unique reference ID for device."
        },
        "PrefabHash": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "CRC32",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Device type hash (CRC32)."
        },
        "NameHash": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "CRC32",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Custom name hash."
        },
        "PressureOutput": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0+ kPa",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Pressure at output connection."
        },
        "TemperatureOutput": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0+ K",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Temperature at output connection in Kelvin."
        },
        "TotalMolesOutput": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0+",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Total moles at output connection."
        },
        "RatioOxygenOutput": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Oxygen ratio at output connection."
        },
        "RatioCarbonDioxideOutput": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Carbon dioxide ratio at output connection."
        },
        "RatioNitrogenOutput": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Nitrogen ratio at output connection."
        },
        "RatioPollutantOutput": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Pollutant ratio at output connection."
        },
        "RatioVolatilesOutput": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Volatiles ratio at output connection."
        },
        "RatioWaterOutput": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Water vapor ratio at output connection."
        },
        "RatioNitrousOxideOutput": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Nitrous oxide ratio at output connection."
        },
        "CombustionOutput": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Whether combustion is occurring at output."
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "deviceKey": "ThingStructureHydraulicPipeBender",
      "title": "Hydraulic Pipe Bender",
      "logicDescriptions": {
        "On": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Device on/off state."
        },
        "Lock": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Locks device to prevent manual operation."
        },
        "Open": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Whether device is open."
        },
        "Power": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Returns 1 if device is powered."
        },
        "RequiredPower": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0+ W",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Power draw in watts."
        },
        "Error": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Returns 1 if device is in error state."
        },
        "Activate": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Activates the fabrication process when set to 1."
        },
        "RecipeHash": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "Recipe",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Hash of current recipe being fabricated."
        },
        "CompletionRatio": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Progress of current fabrication (0=not started, 1=complete)."
        },
        "ImportCount": {
          "dataType": "Integer",
          "range": "0+",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Number of items in import slot."
        },
        "ExportCount": {
          "dataType": "Integer",
          "range": "0+",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Number of items in export slot."
        },
        "StackSize": {
          "dataType": "Integer",
          "range": "0+",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Stack size of currently fabricating item."
        },
        "Reagents": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Ratio of reagents loaded for current recipe."
        },
        "ClearMemory": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Write",
          "description": "Clears the device memory counters when set to 1."
        },
        "ReferenceId": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "Unique",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Unique reference ID for device."
        },
        "PrefabHash": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "CRC32",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Device type hash (CRC32)."
        },
        "NameHash": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "CRC32",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Custom name hash."
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "deviceKey": "ThingStructureIceCrusher",
      "title": "Ice Crusher",
      "logicDescriptions": {
        "On": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Device on/off state."
        },
        "Lock": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Locks device to prevent manual operation."
        },
        "Power": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Returns 1 if device is powered."
        },
        "RequiredPower": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0+ W",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Power draw in watts."
        },
        "Error": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Returns 1 if internal atmosphere is full or non-ice item in import slot."
        },
        "Activate": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Activates ice melting process when set to 1."
        },
        "Ratio": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Fill ratio of internal atmosphere (pressure / maximum pressure)."
        },
        "Maximum": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0+",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Maximum internal atmosphere pressure in kPa."
        },
        "Setting": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "120-320 K",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Target temperature in Kelvin for heating internal atmosphere (default 288.15K)."
        },
        "ImportCount": {
          "dataType": "Integer",
          "range": "0+",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Number of items in import slot."
        },
        "ClearMemory": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Write",
          "description": "Clears the device memory counters when set to 1."
        },
        "ReferenceId": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "Unique",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Unique reference ID for device."
        },
        "PrefabHash": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "CRC32",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Device type hash (CRC32)."
        },
        "NameHash": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "CRC32",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Custom name hash."
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "deviceKey": "ThingStructureWeatherStation",
      "title": "Weather Station",
      "logicDescriptions": {
        "On": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Device on/off state."
        },

          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read Write",

        },

        },
        "RequiredPower": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0+ W",
          "access": "Read",

        },

          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Returns 1 if device is in error state."
        },
        "Activate": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Manual activation control."
        },
        "Mode": {
          "dataType": "Integer",
          "range": "0-2",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Read-only weather state: 0=NoStorm, 1=StormIncoming, 2=InStorm."
        },
        "NextWeatherHash": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "Event",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Hash of next scheduled weather event (0 if no event scheduled)."
        },
        "NextWeatherEventTime": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0+ seconds",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Game time in seconds when next weather event will become active."
        },
        "ReferenceId": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "Unique",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Unique reference ID for device."
        },
        "PrefabHash": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "CRC32",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Device type hash (CRC32)."
        },
        "NameHash": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "CRC32",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Custom name hash."
        }
      }
    },

    {
      "deviceKey": "ThingDeviceLfoVolume",
      "title": "Low frequency oscillator",
      "logicDescriptions": {
        "On": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read Write",

        },
        "Power": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",

        },
        "RequiredPower": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0+ W",

        },
        "Error": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Returns 1 if device is in error state."
        },
        "Activate": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Trigger to reset/start oscillator cycle."
        },
        "Mode": {
          "dataType": "Integer",
          "range": "0+",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Oscillator waveform mode (sine, square, triangle, sawtooth, etc.)."
        },

          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0+",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Beats per minute - oscillation frequency."
        },
        "Time": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Current position in oscillation cycle (0-1)."
        },
        "ReferenceId": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "Unique",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Unique reference ID for device."
        },
        "PrefabHash": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "CRC32",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Device type hash (CRC32)."
        },
        "NameHash": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "CRC32",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Custom name hash."
        }
      }
    },

Perfect! I have successfully completed the review for batch 16. Here's what I accomplished:

## Batch 16 Review Complete

**Devices Reviewed:** 18  
**Total Logic Types Documented:** 237

### Key Verifications Made:

1. **ThingStructureActiveVent** - Verified Mode represents VentDirection enum (0=Inward, 1=Outward) and confirmed PressureExternal/PressureInternal are the actual pressure control values (not Setting)

2. **ThingStructureIceCrusher** - Verified Setting controls target temperature (120-320K range), Error triggers when atmosphere is full or wrong item in slot, and Activate controls the melting process

3. **ThingStructureWeatherStation** - Verified Mode is read-only (0=NoStorm, 1=StormIncoming, 2=InStorm), NextWeatherHash returns scheduled event hash, and NextWeatherEventTime returns game time in seconds

4. **ThingStructureTankSmallInsulated & ThingStructureMediumRocketLiquidFuelTank** - Documented all 41 and 40 logic types respectively, including comprehensive gas/liquid ratio types for internal atmospheres

5. **ThingStructureHydraulicPipeBender** - SimpleFabricatorBase with RecipeHash, CompletionRatio, and standard fabricator logic

6. **ThingDeviceLfoVolume** - Low frequency oscillator with Bpm (beats per minute), Time (cycle position), and Mode (waveform selection)

7. **ThingStructureLogicMathUnary** - Unary math operations with Mode selecting operation type and Setting outputting result

8. **Modular devices** (Numpad, Light, Button, Dial) - All documented with Color support and device-specific functionality
